sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_date Date, days_since_zero UInt32);
UPDATE test_dates SET days_since_zero = toDaysSinceYearZero(toDate('2021-01-01')) WHERE event_date = toDate('2023-09-08');
SELECT event_date, days_since_zero FROM test_dates WHERE days_since_zero > toDaysSinceYearZero(toDate('2000-01-01'));
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dates WHERE days_since_zero BETWEEN toDaysSinceYearZero(toDate('2010-01-01')) AND toDaysSinceYearZero(toDate('2020-01-01'));
